case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. JENNIE FITZHUGH

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT FITZHUGH, JENNIE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
